text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Narita Taishin conquers the Satsuki<n>Sho, the first
race of the Classic Triple<n>Crown.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Drawing the eyes of the entire<n>racecourse, she
proudly declares that<n>the track is where she
belongs.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
In the stands is a young, redheaded<n>girl who is
moved to tears by her<n>incredible run.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Winning Ticket, having lost the race,<n>firmly vows to
win the next race—the<n>Japanese Derby.
